subcodes.first_line: The Day hath come, yet most of humanity remaineth heedless. The Call hath been raised in truth, yet most of the people remain among those who are negligent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و الناس اکثرهم من الغافلین و ظهرت الصیحه بالحق و القوم اکثرهم من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prayer for spiritual recognition
